violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item stored in an unapproved location. Left over Pumpkin flavored donut mix stored on the chemical shelf. This product should be discarded.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Proofer, possibly home made, showing signs of wear, tear, and Oxidation.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Hood system appears to be unable to capture all vapors from the frier. Canopy does not over all cooking surfaces.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. Establishment has a two-sink system instead of a three-sink system. DOH Note: Either a 3-compartment sink or commercial dishwasher must be installed.--Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. The establishment does not have sanitizer on hand at the time of inspection.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single-use cups, lids, and other items stored on the floor in the basement area. Paper towels under the mixer table on the floor upstairs.

Service/janitor's sink. — --Service sink/curbed floor drain was not provided or used for disposal of waste water. Currently dumping the water outside. Until a mop sink can be provided dispose down the toilet.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. Vents needed to be covered wax paper. Roof is leaking. Containers are being used to capture moister.--Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. A carpet is being used as a walk path in the dry storage/basement area. It is well worn and should be thrown out.--Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Basement has exposed, raw-wood shelves and joists throughout.

General premises. — --Food establishment and all parts of the property in connection with their operation were not kept free from litter. A large amount of 5 gallon buckets are being stored downstairs behind/under the stairs causing clutter.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop is being stored in a 5 gallon bucket unable to air dry.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Donut mix and sugar on the floor in the basement dry storage area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Proofer has deteriorated and is not smooth or cleanable.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Counter-to in the back of the prep area is cracked and is a not cleanable surface. Shelving has unsealed edges and is broken.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not designed and/or constructed properly. Establishment has 2 compartment sink only.--Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Establishment currently mixing soap and bleach in wash basin of 2 tub sink system. Operate as follows... 1) Hot soapy water 2) clear water rinse 3) Sanitizing rinse 4) Air dry all utensils

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use containers and lids on the floor in the dry storage area downstairs.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Ceiling in the basement has exposed rafters.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc… were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor matts in the back have a excessive build-up they need cleaning. Floors underneath equipment and kitchen areas need cleaning.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop in the back closet is setting in a bucket, wet and not in the proper position to dry.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
